arts.ttl: John Eustace confirms Derby County duo to stay
arts.sum: John Eustace has confirmed that first-team coach Matt Hamshaw and goalkeeping coach Andy Warrington will be part of his set-up at Derby County. Hamshaw had said he had wanted to stay at Derby after being placed in charge on an interim basis after Warne's departure earlier this month.

arts.ttl: John Eustace explains why he moved to Derby County after David Clowes talks
arts.sum: John Eustace is excited by the project at Derby County and is intent on enjoying long-term success after finally being confirmed as their new head coach. "After speaking to David, he's offered me that opportunity to be at a huge football club and to build over the next three or four years and try to bring success to it.

arts.ttl: Jackson, Phillips out: How Derby County could line up under John Eustace after new boss’ arrival
arts.sum: Derby County have confirmed the appointment of John Eustace as their new head coach following Paul Warne’s exit… The post Jackson, Phillips out: How Derby County could line up under John Eustace after new boss’ arrival appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Blackburn Rovers confirm John Eustace exit as Derby County set to announce arrival
arts.sum: Rovers' statement read: "Blackburn Rovers can confirm that John Eustace has left his role as Head Coach to take up a position with another Championship club. His assistants Matt Gardiner and Keith Downing will also be leaving and are set to head to Pride Park to make up his backroom team.

arts.ttl: David Clowes reveals why he wants John Eustace as Derby County's head coach
arts.sum: "When we bought the club, I was moved by the passion, solidarity and shared belief that bonded all of us who cared about Derby County. David Clowes says he is "excited" to welcome John Eustace back to Derby County after they confirmed his arrival as their new head coach.

arts.ttl: Signing player after QPR exit part of almighty gamble to avoid relegation
arts.sum: According to a report in the Portuguese media, Boavista signing the likes of Osman Kakay could be a boost for the Porto based club as they stare relegation in the face. Kakay has just signed for Boavista after his contract with Queens Park Rangers expired at the end of last season. Jornal de Notícias today The post Signing player after QPR exit part of almighty gamble to avoid relegation appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: From fifth to 21st: Eustace leaves Blackburn to become Derby boss
arts.sum: John Eustace has left Blackburn Rovers to become the new head coach at their Championship rivals Derby County.

arts.ttl: ‘A huge task ahead’ – QPR vs Derby County prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their QPR vs Derby County prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Friday. The post ‘A huge task ahead’ – QPR vs Derby County prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Derby County next manager live - John Eustace and backroom team confirmed, new statement issued - Derbyshire Live
arts.sum: David Lowe took charge of Blackburn in place of wantaway manager John Eustace and hailed his players as a “credit to the club” after they earned a 2-0 victory at fellow Championship play-off rivals West Brom. Stand-in coach Lowe oversaw the team ahead of the clash at the Hawthorns and all-but confirmed the departure of Eustace and his backroom staff, who were in talks with relegation-threatened Derby .

arts.ttl: John Eustace to Derby County confirmed and his new backroom team as Blackburn coach speaks out
arts.sum: David Lowe took charge of Blackburn in place of wantaway manager John Eustace and hailed his players as a “credit to the club” after they earned a 2-0 victory at fellow Championship play-off rivals West Brom. “But, they’ve (the players) been a credit really, to come to a place like this who don’t lose many games, they were a credit to the club and themselves.
